mnemonics: Pandas are powerful animals that can handle data like a beast
keyPoints: DataFrames are 2D tables with labeled rows and columns
Series are 1D labeled arrays similar to columns
Use .loc[] and .iloc[] for label-based and integer-based indexing respectively
commonMistakes: Using standard Python operators instead of pandas methods (e.g., == instead of .eq())
Modifying a DataFrame slice without using .copy() leading to SettingWithCopyWarning
Forgetting to handle missing values (NaN) before calculations
